tasks.title: Database migrations for new tables
tasks.description: Create migrations for: brand_profiles, recipes, projects, user_video_segments, visual_scripts, rendered_videos
tasks.notes: Single migration file creates all 6 tables with proper FK ordering. Migration verified on Supabase.

tasks.title: Project model + API endpoints
tasks.description: Implement Project CRUD API: list, create, get, update, delete projects
tasks.notes: Implementation complete. Also fixed SQLite test compatibility issue by adding type compilers for JSONB, ARRAY, and pgvector Vector in conftest.py.

tasks.title: User upload pipeline - multi-file upload
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/projects/{id}/upload for multi-file video upload to Supabase
tasks.notes: Implemented multi-file upload with: ProjectFile model for tracking, upload service with validation (max files, size limits, video formats), endpoints for upload/list/delete files, project stats now reflect actual upload data. All 15 upload tests pass.

tasks.title: User content analysis pipeline
tasks.description: Analyze uploaded videos with Gemini, extract timestamped segments, generate embeddings
tasks.notes: Implemented: UserContentAnalyzer service using Gemini 2.0 Flash for video analysis with timestamps, OpenAI embeddings (1536-dim) for semantic search. API endpoints: POST /projects/{id}/analyze, POST /projects/{id}/files/{file_id}/analyze, GET /projects/{id}/segments. All 19 tests pass.

tasks.title: Recipe extraction service
tasks.description: Extract structural recipes from analyzed competitor ads
tasks.notes: Implemented RecipeExtractor service that extracts structural templates from analyzed ads. Supports both video_intelligence (V2) and ad_elements data sources. API endpoints: GET /api/recipes (list with filters), GET /api/recipes/{id}, POST /api/recipes/extract, DELETE /api/recipes/{id}. Extracts beat definitions with duration ranges (±20% flexibility), cinematics, rhetorical modes, text overlay patterns. Auto-generates recipe names based on structure. All 32 tests pass.

tasks.title: Frontend: Project creation flow
tasks.description: Build project list page and project creation UI
tasks.notes: Implemented complete project management UI: TypeScript types matching backend schemas, API client with CRUD operations, React Query hooks for data fetching/caching, projects list page with search/filter/pagination, project cards showing stats, create/edit dialog with validation, delete confirmation dialog, navigation links added to Sidebar and MobileNav. Build passes.

tasks.title: Frontend: Project upload flow
tasks.description: Build multi-file upload UI with progress indicators
tasks.notes: Implemented complete upload flow: UploadProgress component with drag-drop, file validation (type, size, count limits), upload progress bar with axios progress tracking. VideoSegmentList component shows extracted segments grouped by source file with accordion, search/filter, analyze/re-analyze buttons, segment cards with thumbnails, timestamps, tags. Project detail page refactored with tabs (Upload, Files, Segments). All new hooks: useUploadProjectFiles, useProjectSegments, useAnalyzeProject, useAnalyzeFile. All 10 e2e tests pass, build passes.

tasks.title: Content Planning Agent (Writer)
tasks.description: Implement Writer agent that generates visual scripts from recipes and user content
tasks.notes: Implemented ContentPlanningAgent service that generates visual scripts from recipes + user content. Uses GPT-4 to create slots with search queries, overlay text, transitions, and cinematics. 15 tests pass. Schema includes VisualScriptSlot, ContentPlanningInput/Output, generate request/response.

tasks.title: Project-scoped semantic retrieval
tasks.description: Add project-scoped search to semantic search service
tasks.notes: Implemented: search_project_segments (single query), search_project_segments_batch (multiple queries), search_slots_in_project (visual script slots), find_similar_segments_in_project. All methods use pgvector cosine similarity with configurable min_similarity threshold. 12 tests pass.

tasks.title: Director Agent (Assembler)
tasks.description: Implement Director agent that selects clips and generates Remotion payload
tasks.notes: Implemented DirectorAgent service with: clip selection (70/30 similarity/duration weighting), gap handling (B-Roll generation, text slides, skip), Remotion payload generation with timeline segments, brand profile support, audio track config, clip replacement API. RemotionPayload schema with composition types (vertical/horizontal/square), segment types (video_clip/generated_broll/text_slide), transitions, text overlays. 22 tests pass.

tasks.title: Frontend: Inspiration selection UI
tasks.description: Build inspiration gallery and source selector components
tasks.notes: Three sources: library, upload reference, paste URL

tasks.title: Ad generation endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/projects/{id}/generate - orchestrates Writer + Retrieval + Director
tasks.notes: Full pipeline: recipes -> visual script -> search -> remotion payload

tasks.title: Remotion Lambda infrastructure
tasks.description: Set up Remotion Lambda on AWS for cloud rendering
tasks.notes: AWS Lambda + S3, IAM roles, API Gateway

tasks.title: Remotion compositions
tasks.description: Create Remotion compositions for vertical, horizontal, square formats
tasks.notes: 9:16, 16:9, 1:1 aspect ratios

tasks.title: Render service + API
tasks.description: Implement render service and API endpoints
tasks.notes: POST /render, GET /render/{id}, PUT /render/{id}/payload

tasks.title: Frontend: Remotion Player integration
tasks.description: Embed Remotion Player for real-time preview

tasks.title: Frontend: Timeline editor
tasks.description: Build timeline with editable slots, clip swap modal
tasks.notes: Click slot to replace, edit text fields, adjust timing

tasks.title: Veo 2 B-Roll generation service
tasks.description: Integrate Veo 2 API for generating B-Roll clips
tasks.notes: POST /broll/generate, POST /broll/regenerate

tasks.title: Frontend: B-Roll generation UI
tasks.description: Build B-Roll generator component with regenerate/edit prompt

tasks.title: User onboarding questionnaire
tasks.description: Implement onboarding flow to capture brand profile
tasks.notes: 3-step flow: industry, core offer, competitors

tasks.title: Upload reference ad / fetch from URL
tasks.description: Add ability to upload or fetch reference ads for recipe extraction
tasks.notes: Processing time warning: 2-3 minutes

tasks.title: End-to-end testing
tasks.description: Comprehensive Playwright tests for full user flow
tasks.notes: Test full pipeline: onboarding -> project -> upload -> inspire -> generate -> edit
